original_statement: which was the first year in which ernie els won a championship?
mutated_statement: which was the first year in which someone did something of note?
mutation_analysis: 实体替换 + 事件泛化 + 语义模糊化: 人名 "ernie els" 被泛化为 "someone" | 特定事件 "won a championship" 被泛化为 非特定行为 "did something of note" (ernie els→someone | won a championship→did something of note)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的陈述（“The earliest year... is 1999... No earlier year appears in the table.”）可识别关键信息：agent直接断定答案为1999且未提及任何不确定性或要求澄清。具体表现为：没有在judge_thought或critique中使用ambiguous/unclear/需要更多信息等词汇，未指出原问题由“ernie els→someone”“won a championship→did something of note”导致的泛化模糊，而是把变异问题当作明确询问并给出具体年份。基于以上证据，判定为“无法意识到指令模糊”，因为agent未识别或说明问题歧义就直接作答。
